title: Rename varlink socket and interface
body:
io.projectatomic.podman -> io.containers.podman

Python changes to be deferred to Jhonce

Signed-off-by: baude <bbaude@redhat.com>

comments.body: LGTM. But I'd like to have the corresponding Python changes ready to go when we merge, so we minimize the window of breakage.
@jwhonce i could do the name changes if you like ... but didnt want to upset any code you might be working on right now (i.e. rebase hell)
:umbrella: The latest upstream changes (presumably #1202) made this pull request unmergeable. Please resolve the merge conflicts.
:umbrella: The latest upstream changes (presumably a1e3e54) made this pull request unmergeable. Please resolve the merge conflicts.

We should move libpod to github.com/containers/libpod this week along with this change.
containers.io is owned by Docker, so the name of the interface is probably bad.
podman.io seems like it is still available or libpod.io.
This now includes the changes for python

LGTM
@rh-atomic-bot r+
